title: Defender (role)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Defender''' was a role in traditional challenge by personal combat in [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

The challenge included two individual fighters attacking each other with [[dematoil]]s. The [[Succession Judge]] was to be a neutral observer. Each fighter was allowed to have a Defender, traditionally used to avoid uninvited interruptions of the battle, but more commonly used to verify that the battle was kept honorably.<ref name="AIR" />

[[Aul Tarrus Vishav]] was [[Quaal Tavier Catharius]]'s Defender when Catharius fougth his enemy [[Jael Ganton Farvash]]<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
